Author: Martz
Name: Qiqirn Companion
Description: Browse open FC craft projects and claim tasks directly from inside the game. Also shows what you can craft from your current inventory with current Marketboard prices.
Punchline: In-game FC project tracker and craft-from-inventory helper.
Changelog: Smart search: /qiqirn <item> opens results and jumps to item info on an exact match; new 'Qiqirn Search' entry on the game's right-click menu (inventory items + chat links) opens item info directly.
